A

attachFlixelWindowListener(FlixelLwjgl3ApplicationConfiguration) - Static method in class me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3.FlixelLwjgl3Launcher
Ensures Flixel window notifications, optional user Lwjgl3WindowListener, and close-absorption wrapping are installed.
attachFlixelWindowListenerChain() - Method in class me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3.FlixelLwjgl3ApplicationConfiguration
Wraps FlixelLwjgl3ApplicationConfiguration.getUserWindowListener() inside Flixel GLFW hooks and installs the chaining listener used for close absorption support.

B

bringWindowToForeground() - Method in class me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3.FlixelLwjgl3Window

copy(T) - Method in class me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3.runtime.reflect.FlixelReflectASMHandler
 
created(Lwjgl3Window) - Method in class me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3.FlixelLwjgl3ChainingWindowListener
 

D

destroy() - Method in class me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3.debug.FlixelImGuiDebugOverlay
Tears down the Dear ImGui resources in the safe order: GL3 renderer first (which detaches GL state), then the GLFW backend (which removes its callback chain), and finally the imgui context itself.
draw() - Method in class me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3.debug.FlixelImGuiDebugOverlay
 

F

field(Object, String) - Method in class me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3.runtime.reflect.FlixelReflectASMHandler
 
fields(Object) - Method in class me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3.runtime.reflect.FlixelReflectASMHandler
 
filesDropped(String[]) - Method in class me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3.FlixelLwjgl3ChainingWindowListener
 
FlixelImGuiDebugOverlay - Class in me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3.debug
Dear ImGui based debug overlay for the LWJGL3 backend.
FlixelImGuiDebugOverlay() - Constructor for class me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3.debug.FlixelImGuiDebugOverlay
 
FlixelLwjgl3Alerter - Class in me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3.alert
 
FlixelLwjgl3Alerter() - Constructor for class me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3.alert.FlixelLwjgl3Alerter
 
FlixelLwjgl3ApplicationConfiguration - Class in me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3
libGDX LWJGL3 application configuration that records the last user-set Lwjgl3WindowListener so FlixelLwjgl3Launcher can wrap it for Flixel window hooks and optional close absorption without reflection.
FlixelLwjgl3ApplicationConfiguration() - Constructor for class me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3.FlixelLwjgl3ApplicationConfiguration
 
FlixelLwjgl3ChainingWindowListener - Class in me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3
Outermost GLFW listener that can veto close requests when absorption is enabled.
FlixelLwjgl3ChainingWindowListener(Lwjgl3WindowListener) - Constructor for class me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3.FlixelLwjgl3ChainingWindowListener
 
FlixelLwjgl3HostIntegration - Class in me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3
Desktop FlixelHostIntegration: freedesktop or Zenity notifications on Linux, osascript on macOS, WinRT toasts via PowerShell on Windows, GLFW window attention, and AWT Taskbar attention where available.
FlixelLwjgl3HostIntegration() - Constructor for class me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3.FlixelLwjgl3HostIntegration
 
FlixelLwjgl3Launcher - Class in me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3
Launches the desktop (LWJGL3) version of the Flixel game.
FlixelLwjgl3Launcher() - Constructor for class me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3.FlixelLwjgl3Launcher
 
FlixelLwjgl3MouseIconManager - Class in me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3.input
LWJGL3 mapping for FlixelMouseIconManager using libGDX system cursors.
FlixelLwjgl3MouseIconManager() - Constructor for class me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3.input.FlixelLwjgl3MouseIconManager
 
FlixelLwjgl3Window - Class in me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3
GLFW-backed FlixelWindow for the LWJGL3 backend.
FlixelLwjgl3Window() - Constructor for class me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3.FlixelLwjgl3Window
 
FlixelReflectASMHandler - Class in me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3.runtime.reflect
ReflectASM-first handler with Java reflection fallback.
FlixelReflectASMHandler() - Constructor for class me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3.runtime.reflect.FlixelReflectASMHandler
 
FlixelReflectASMHandler(FlixelDefaultReflectionHandler) - Constructor for class me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3.runtime.reflect.FlixelReflectASMHandler

L

launch(FlixelGame) - Static method in class me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3.FlixelLwjgl3Launcher
Launches the LWJGL3 version of the Flixel game in RELEASE mode and with a default configuration object.
launch(FlixelGame, String...) - Static method in class me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3.FlixelLwjgl3Launcher
Launches the LWJGL3 version of the Flixel game in RELEASE mode and with pre-made configuration object.
launch(FlixelGame, FlixelRuntimeMode, String...) - Static method in class me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3.FlixelLwjgl3Launcher
Launches the LWJGL3 version of the Flixel game with the given runtime mode and a pre-made configuration object.
launch(FlixelGame, FlixelRuntimeMode, FlixelLwjgl3ApplicationConfiguration) - Static method in class me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3.FlixelLwjgl3Launcher
Launches the LWJGL3 version of the Flixel game in RELEASE mode using the given configuration.
